title: The Man Who Never Smiled
content: Everyone in the neighborhood knew the elderly man who walked through the park every morning. He greeted people politely but never smiled, which led many residents to believe he was unfriendly. One rainy afternoon, a young boy accidentally dropped his bicycle near him. Without hesitation, the man helped repair the broken chain and patiently explained how to prevent similar problems. As they talked, the boy learned that the man had once been a bicycle mechanic. Before leaving, he smiled warmly for the first time. The mystery disappeared, revealing someone who simply expressed kindness more through actions than expressions.
